implementationSummary: Extended Phase 2.6 Demo Decision shells for Workflows 2–4 (optimize product, replenish inventory, clear excess): isolated per-workflow review stages and FBS timelines, shared registry wiring, truthful Unresolved/FBT labels, Approve enabled for WF1–4, and one review→approve→In Progress integration test per workflow.
assumptions: Shared RecommendationReview and In Progress shells remain workflow-agnostic once stages/timelines exist
Terminal lifecycle completion uses last outcome step by stepNumber rather than WF1-only listed-outcome id
Workflows 5–9 remain Approve-disabled until later slices
risks: packages/contracts lifecycle generalization is shared-core FE surface — coordinate if parallel contract PRs land
Demo timelines are mock screen-states; real TikTok waits/webhooks remain Phase 3
